activeSkills.name: Compounding Shot
activeSkills.description: 100% damage to 1 enemy, plus 100% for each sleeping or frostburned enemy (max of 500% total damage). The user is granted a Power Charge. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Power Charges cannot stack and will be removed when the user leaves the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Stars of Victory
activeSkills.description: Weakens all enemies. Enrages and heals all allies on the battlefield for 1000% of the user's attack. Then immediately give all other allies that are burning or the Water element the next turns by reducing their current TU. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn. Unlocked each time a non-conjured enemy on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. These effects will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on affected units. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

activeSkills.name: Missile Storm
activeSkills.description: Consumes a Power Charge for 600% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, Skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Each enemy hit is then randomly granted either the Deep Sleep status effect for 100TU (even if they have already slept while on the battlefield), or Frostburn. Usable only if the user has a Power Charge. Deep Sleep will overwrite other status effects, cannot be overwritten by Burn or Sleep status effects, and cannot be Purified. When a unit has Frostburn and they get the turn, they will lose the turn as if they were sleeping, then Frostburn is removed and that unit is granted the Burn status effect. Frostburn is not a status effect, but effects that remove negative status effects will also remove Frostburn. Frostburn will end if the affected unit is defeated or leaves the battlefield. Frostburn cannot apply to boss units, and cannot stack. Burn will overwrite other status effects. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

activeSkills.name: Grand Finale
activeSkills.description: 400% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, skin passive skills, and the Counter Stance status effect. When this attack hits a non-boss, non-Ephemeral target and that target has 10% or less of max HP remaining after damage, that target is immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful). This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the enemy from being defeated. Usable only if the user has stored 3 Charges. Consumes all Charges on the user.

activeSkills.name: Sharp Note
activeSkills.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy, and then grants that enemy the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. Then the user is granted a Charge. This attack ignores Guardians, damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. This skill unlocks Broken Chord upon use, and becomes locked after use until the user uses Broken Chord or Grand Finale. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges.

activeSkills.name: Broken Chord
activeSkills.description: 250% damage to 2 enemies, and the user is granted a Charge. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. If Ally Spirit is less than 5, raises Ally Spirit to 5. If Enemy Spirit is more than 5, lowers Enemy Spirit to 5. This skill is locked until it becomes unlocked by Sharp Note. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Inspiring Song
activeSkills.description: Heals all allies on the battlefield for 1000% of the user's attack, Purifies them (removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison), and grants each of them a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, Poison Ward, Burn Ward, and Intense Rage. The user gains the Recovery Melody. If the user already has Recovery Melody active, the user randomly gains either the Water, Storm, Earth or Fire Melody instead. While active, Recovery Melody will heal Chopin for 25% of max HP each time an ally gets the turn. Then immediately give all other allies the next turns by reducing their current TU. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn. Locked for 50TU after the user has entered the battlefield, and locks again for 50TU after each use. Intense Rage increases a unit's Attack to 1.5x for their next 3 turns, and will overwrite existing Weak or Enrage effects. It cannot be overwritten by other Enrage effects but can be overwritten by Weak effects. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

activeSkills.name: Prismatic Voice
activeSkills.description: Targets 1 enemy. This skill will randomly deal either 300%, 600% or 900% damage. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. This skill unlocks Spirited Beat upon use. When this attack damages a: - burning enemy, all non-Fire element enemies without Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skills will be granted the burn status effect at the end of the turn. - sleeping enemy, all non-poisoned enemies will be granted the Sleep status effect for 100TU at the end of the turn, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. - poisoned enemy, all non-sleeping enemies will be granted the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU at the end of the turn. Burn, Sleep and Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

activeSkills.name: Spirited Beat
activeSkills.description: Allies gain 1 Spirit for each ally on the battlefield. This skill unlocks Disabling Chorus upon use. Then if ally Spirit is: - At least 1, all allies on the battlefield are Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed) at the end of the turn. - At least 5, also another random ally is given the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0 at the end of the turn. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill. - At 10, also adds 500% to the damage % of this user's next attack (e.g. Disabling Chorus: 300% => 800% damage when Center Stage has not been used 3 times). This skill is locked until it becomes unlocked by Prismatic Voice. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Disabling Chorus
activeSkills.description: 300% damage to all enemies. 500% damage instead if the user has used Center Stage 3 times in this battle. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. All enemies hit have their Active Skills disabled for 10TU. When a unit's Active Skills are disabled and they get the turn, they will lose the turn as if they were sleeping. This effect cannot affect boss units, cannot be purified, and will end if the user is defeated. This skill is locked until it becomes unlocked by Spirited Beat. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield

activeSkills.name: Center Stage
activeSkills.description: Heals all allies on the battlefield for 1000% of the user's attack, and Fortifies them. Usable only if the user is not alone, and 1 or more allies on the battlefield are not Fortified. Usable 3 times per battle. A Fortified unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks. This reduction cannot be ignored by attacks that do not specifically ignore Fortify. Fortify will be removed after reducing damage 3 times since applying, and will be reset if reapplied. This is not a status effect.

activeSkills.name: Passionate Cleave
activeSkills.description: 250% damage to 1 enemy, plus 150% for each time this skill has already been used while on the battlefield (max of 1000% total damage). The user will immediately get the next turn if this is the first time this skill has been used while on the battlefield or if this unit has used Meteor Call or Tides of War since this skill was last used. Then heals all allies for 800% of the user's attack, and grant them the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

activeSkills.name: Meteor Call
activeSkills.description: 400% damage to 2 enemies. Every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield, this skill will randomly deal either 800% or 1000% damage instead. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect.

activeSkills.name: Infernal Blaze
activeSkills.description: Grants all enemies the Burn status effect. The user is healed for 100% of max HP, granted an Instant Death Ward, Burn, and a Burn Shield. Then if the user is in War Frenzy, all burning enemies on the battlefield are Stunned for 50TU. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use. An Instant Death Ward prevents this unit from being immediately defeated without damage by a non-boss enemy once, then is removed. Instant Death Wards cannot be ignored and cannot stack. Burn Shields prevent the next non-burn status effect a unit would gain while Burning from applying.

activeSkills.name: Tides of War
activeSkills.description:
1000% damage to 1 enemy. Then the user will enter War Frenzy for 100TU, and immediately give all other allies that are burning the next turns by reducing their current TU. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn. Usable if the user has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield, and only if the user is not in War Frenzy. Usable 3 times per battle.
TU: 10
Spirit: 3

activeSkills.name: Dragon Prism
activeSkills.description: 300% damage to 1 enemy. 500% damage instead if the user is burning. This attack heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt, and ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. The user is then granted the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on the user. Allies gain Spirit equal to the number of burning enemies on the battlefield after this attack. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

activeSkills.name: Roaring Ignition
activeSkills.description: Heals all burning allies for 800% of the user's attack, and Enrages them. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills on those units. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Then 1 random ally and 1 random enemy are granted the Burn status effect and become infected with it. Usable only if the user has stored 3 Charges. Consumes all Charges on the user. After the end of each turn, this infection will trigger to apply Burn to a random non-burning unit on the infected unit's team. Each infection ends after 3 triggers (even if they find no valid target) or once the infected unit is defeated or leaves the battlefield. Infection is not a status effect and cannot be prevented or purified, but the status effect spread by the infection may be. A unit cannot get a new infection until their existing one ends.

activeSkills.name: Combo Blaze
activeSkills.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy. 600% damage instead if all allies on the battlefield are burning. This attack heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt, and ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Dual Destruction
activeSkills.description: 700% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable only if 2 or more units on the same team are burning. If this skill is used 3 times within 10TU, it becomes locked for 50TU.

activeSkills.name: Hammering Blade
activeSkills.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy. 500% damage instead if the user has survived 100TU or more on the battlefield. 600% damage instead if the user has survived 200TU or more on the battlefield. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Then stuns the target for 100TU, then if the hit target has 200TU or more and is not a Stun Absorber, they can no longer be Stunned by Hammering Blade unless they leave the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Thunder Shield
activeSkills.description: For each ally on the battlefield that is Sleeping or on or below 95% of max HP, Allies gain 1 Spirit, and a random enemy is Stunned for 100TU. Then all allies on the battlefield heal for 1000% of the user's attack, are Purified (removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison), and granted a Stun Ward and Sleep Ward. Usable if any ally on the battlefield is on or below 95% of max HP. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

activeSkills.name: Disabling Bolts
activeSkills.description: The enemy with the lowest current TU and the enemy with the highest current TU have their Active Skills disabled for 50TU. When a unit's Active Skills are disabled and they get the turn, they will lose the turn as if they were sleeping. This effect cannot affect boss units, cannot be purified, and will end if the user is defeated. Usable only if there are at least 2 non-Imposter enemies on the battlefield and becomes locked for 50TU after use. Usable 5 times per battle.

activeSkills.name: Thundering Wrath
activeSkills.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable if the user is not a Guardian, and only 3 times per battle.

activeSkills.name: Sweeping Thrust
activeSkills.description:
300% damage to all enemies. 400% damage instead if the user has Stealth. This attack ignores any enemy status effects (including Stealth), damage reduction effects, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills. This is considered a Stealth Strike type skill.

The user is granted Super Stealth, and a Stealth Shield. If the user already has Stealth, all other allies will be granted Super Stealth and a Stealth Shield instead.

Super Stealth will overwrite other Status effects. Super Stealthed units ignore enemy attacks that would damage more than 1 target. Super Stealth will be removed after ignoring 3 enemy attacks since applying, and can be overwritten by other status effects, except normal Stealth. Damage will not remove Super Stealth. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying.

activeSkills.name: Lethal Downfall
activeSkills.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy. 450% damage instead if the enemy has 1 Guardian on the battlefield. 600% damage instead if the enemy has 2+ Guardians on the battlefield. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

Then, if that enemy is not burning, they are granted Lethal Poison for 999TU.

This skill becomes locked after use until the user deals damage with another attack. This is not considered a Combo Burst type active skill.

Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.

activeSkills.name: Stealth Alliance
activeSkills.description:
Immediately give all other allies that have a Stealth Strike type active skill or Stealth the next turns by reducing their current TU. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn.

Then heals all allies on the battlefield for 100% of their max HP, and grants them Super Stealth and a Stealth Shield.

Usable if 2+ allies on the battlefield have Stealth. This skill is locked for 100TU after use. Usable 3 times per battle.

activeSkills.name: Groundbreaker
activeSkills.description:
400% damage to 2 enemies. 600% damage instead to targets that are poisoned or sleeping. This attack ignores any enemy status effects (including Stealth), damage reduction effects, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills.

Then non-burning targets hit are randomly granted either Cursed Sleep for 200TU, or Lethal Poison for 999TU.

Usable only if the user has the Stealth status effect. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

Cursed Sleep will overwrite status effects other than Burn, cannot be overwritten by Poison, can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage caused by Dream Hunter type active skills.

activeSkills.name: Unstable Blades
activeSkills.description: 1000% damage to 1 enemy. If the target is poisoned, this unit will get another turn after the attack. (Note: This skill scales strongly with poisoned enemies.)

activeSkills.name: Poison Waves
activeSkills.description: Removes all Poison Wards from all enemy units on the battlefield, and steals up to 5 Spirit from the enemy team. Then 1 random non-burning enemy is granted Lethal Poison for 999TU. Then 1 random non-poisoned enemy is granted Mega Poison for 200TU. Then 1 random non-poisoned enemy is granted Super Poison. Then 1 random non-poisoned enemy is granted Poison. This skill cannot be used again until 1 enemy turn has passed. If this skill is used 3 times within 10TU, this skill becomes locked for 50TU. Mega Poison, Super Poison, and Poison will overwrite other status effects on those enemies. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. Super Poison deals 4 times the damage of normal poison, and cannot be overwritten by normal poison.

activeSkills.name: Toxic Burst
activeSkills.description: 1000% damage to 2 enemies. Minus 100% damage for each Spirit the enemy team has (max of -500% if the enemy team has 5+ Spirit). This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Then the targets hit have burn removed (including Mega Healing Burn). Then grants all hit Mega Poisoned enemies Lethal Poison for 999TU. Then grants Mega Poison for 200TU to all other enemies that were hit. Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects on the affected enemy, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.

activeSkills.name: Rashomon
activeSkills.description: All non-boss, non-ephemeral enemies on the battlefield have a 50% chance each of being immediately defeated. This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated. The user is considered to have defeated with attacks as many units as are defeated by this effect. After this skill is used, when the user is defeated by damage from an attack, a copy of the user is added to next in line of ally reinforcements with full health, and will then be considered a conjured unit. Unlocked after 5 or more non-conjured units on the battlefield are defeated or sacrificed by any source while this unit is on the battlefield. Usable once per battle.

activeSkills.name: Oni Claws
activeSkills.description: 300% damage to 1 enemy, plus 100% for each time this unit has defeated an enemy with an attack while on the battlefield (max of 700% total damage after defeating 4 enemies). This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. The user is granted Stealth, and a Stealth Shield. Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next other status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

activeSkills.name: -1 Absolute Slaughter
activeSkills.description: 300% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores Guardians, damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. When this attack hits a non-boss, non-Ephemeral target and that target has 10% or less of max HP remaining after damage, that target is immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful). This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the enemy from being defeated. Usable 10 times per battle.

activeSkills.name: -1 Void Push
activeSkills.description: Targets 1 enemy. Steals up to 1 Spirit from the enemy team for each enemy on the battlefield. Enemy Imposters are counted twice. Then exchanges the target with an Imposter. The exchanged enemy will be sent to a random place in line of enemy reinforcements. If there are no enemy reinforcements, add enough Imposters to the enemy team to still send the targeted enemy to reinforcements (max 3). This effect will not trigger if the targeted enemy is Immovable. Usable only if there are at least 2 non-Imposter enemies on the battlefield and becomes locked for 50TU after use.

activeSkills.name: -1 Dark Heaven Style
activeSkills.description: The user will enter Dark Heaven Stance for 150TU. While in Dark Heaven Stance, this unit heals for 50% of max HP at the end of each turn, will ignore attacks that would damage exactly 2 targets (attacks that target All allies will not be ignored), and this unit's Attack is increased to 1.5x. This attack increase does not stack with Enrage effects. This skill becomes locked for 150TU after use. Usable if this unit has not defeated any units with attacks while on the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Heartfelt Strike
activeSkills.description:
600% damage to 1 enemy. Minus 100% damage for each sleeping, burning or poisoned ally on the battlefield (max of -400% if there are 4 affected allies). This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

Then the target hit will become Weakened, and is granted a Rage ward. This will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on that unit.

Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects. Rage Wards will prevent a unit from becoming Enraged once, then be removed. Rage Wards cannot stack.

activeSkills.name: Goddess Charm
activeSkills.description:
All enemies on the battlefield have their Stealth, Poison Wards, Sleep Wards and Stun Wards removed.

Then all enemies on the battlefield have a 50% chance each to be Charmed for 50TU. A Charmed unit has their attack greatly reduced (e.g. to 0.5x of their original Attack for a unit with no other Attack modifiers. The effect of Charmed may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects). Charmed overwrites Enrage and Weaken effects, and units that are Charmed cannot be Enraged or Weakened. Charmed units are less likely to target the unit that Charmed them with most active skills. Charmed is not a status effect and cannot be removed by Purify skills, but will end if the Charmed unit leaves the battlefield.

This skill cannot be used if an enemy is already Charmed or if the user is alone on the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Overflowing Love
activeSkills.description:
Heals all allies on the battlefield for 1500% of the user's attack. Removes Sleep, Burn and Poison (including Deep Sleep, Mega Healing Burn, and Lethal Poison) from all allies. For each type of status effect removed, the user is granted an immunity to that status effect for 50TU.

Then all allies are Purified (any negative status effects are removed).

Usable if an ally on the battlefield is burning, sleeping or poisoned. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

activeSkills.name: Divine Kiss
activeSkills.description:
300% damage to 2 enemies, plus 100% for each 100TU the user has survived on the battlefield (800% max after 500TU). This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, skin passive skills, and the Counter Stance status effect.

When this attack hits a Charmed, non-boss, non-Ephemeral target and that target has 10% or less of max HP remaining after damage, that target is immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful). This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the enemy from being defeated.

This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

activeSkills.name: Linked Edge
activeSkills.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

Then give all allies that have Rizette's Link the next turns by reducing their current TU (the user will act first). Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn. This skill can be used on such turns, but will not grant the extra turns.

activeSkills.name: Restore Link
activeSkills.description:
Grants Rizette's Link to another random non-conjured ally that does not already have a Link.

Then that ally and the user:
- are healed for 100% max HP.
- have the TU costs for all of their skills reduced by 30%. This will overwrite the effects of other Quicken skills.
- are granted a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, Poison Ward and Instant Death Ward.

Usable only if no other ally on the battlefield has Rizette's Link already, and there is a valid target. Usable 3 times per battle.

activeSkills.name: Elemental Cure
activeSkills.description:
Heals all allies on the battlefield for 800% of the user's attack. Allies gain 2 Spirit for each ally on the battlefield with Rizette's Link.

Then if at least 1 enemy on the battlefield is:
- Water, remove sleep (including Deep Sleep) from all allies on the battlefield and grant them Sleep Wards.
- Fire, remove burn (including Mega Healing Burn) from all units on the battlefield and grant them Burn Wards.
- Earth, remove poison (including Lethal Poison) from all allies on the battlefield and grant them Poison Wards.
- Storm, all allies who have a current TU of 100 or more have their current TU reduced by 50TU. This effect repeats once for each additional Storm enemy on the battlefield. Then grant all allies Stun Wards.
- Dark, grant all allies Stealth, and a Stealth Shield.
- Light, all allies will be Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed). Then if there is no Purify Chain among allies a random ally is granted a Purify Chain.

This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth. A unit with a Purify Chain will Purify another random ally after their turn, then they will pass the Purify Chain to that ally. Purify Chains will end only if the unit with the Purify Chain is defeated, leaves the battlefield, or falls asleep.

activeSkills.name: Cerulean Blade
activeSkills.description: 300% damage to 1 enemy, plus 150% for each non-conjured unit on the battlefield defeated or sacrificed by any source since this unit entered the battlefield (max of 750% total damage after 3 non-conjured units have been defeated). This attack ignores damage reduction effects, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

activeSkills.name: Disabling Strike
activeSkills.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy. 600% damage instead if the target has 100TU or more. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

The first time each enemy is damaged by Disabling Strike since entering the battlefield, it has a 20% chance plus 20% per Awakening of the user (up to 100% chance if the user has 4 Awakenings) to have its Active Skills disabled for 50TU. When a unit's Active Skills are disabled and they get the turn, they will lose the turn as if they were sleeping. This effect cannot affect boss units, cannot be purified, and will end if the user is defeated.

This skill unlocks Oblivion Blast upon use, and becomes locked after use until the user uses Oblivion Blast.

activeSkills.name: Zeus's Blessing
activeSkills.description:
The user is granted 3 Charges.

All non-fire and non-water allies on the battlefield are granted Sleep Immunity for 100TU, Stun Immunity for 100TU (this cannot apply to Stun Absorbers), and the Armor status effect. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed. Armor will overwrite other status effects on those units.

Then all allies on the battlefield heal for 1000% of the user's attack, and have their current TU reduced by 50TU.

Unlocked each time the user defeats a non-conjured enemy with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use.

activeSkills.name: God Storm
activeSkills.description:
Stun a random enemy for 100TU. Then stun a random enemy for 200TU. Then stun a random enemy for 300TU.

Then 1 random enemy at 50TU or less has their Active Skills disabled for 50TU. When a unit's Active Skills are disabled and they get the turn, they will lose the turn as if they were sleeping. This effect cannot affect boss units, cannot be purified, and will end if the user is defeated.

Locked for the first 3 turns the user gets while on the battlefield, and again for 100TU after each use.

activeSkills.name: Oblivion Blast
activeSkills.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy. 600% damage instead if the target has 100TU or more. 900% damage instead if the target has 200TU or more. 1200% damage instead if the target has 400TU or more. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

This skill is locked until it becomes unlocked by Disabling Strike. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Scale Breaker
activeSkills.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

Grants the Sleep status effect for 100TU to one other enemy per Charge stored on the user (max of 3 targets), even if they have already slept while on the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Icy Awakening
activeSkills.description:
Heals the user fully. The user is granted a Charge, Sleep Ward, Poison Ward, and the Armor status effect. Armor will overwrite other status effects. Then the user is Enraged, and will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP.

Unlocked each time the user defeats a non-conjured enemy on the battlefield with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use.

Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.

activeSkills.name: Memory Collapse
activeSkills.description: 200% damage to all enemies. 400% damage instead to targets that are poisoned. 600% damage instead to targets that have the Mega Poison status effect. 800% damage instead to targets that have the Lethal Poison status effect. All non-sleeping enemies hit are then granted Mega Poison for 200TU. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

activeSkills.name: Rings of Fire
activeSkills.description:
200% damage to all enemies, plus 100% for each Charge stored on the user (max of 500% damage). The user is then granted the Burn status effect. Heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

Burn will overwrite other status effects on the user. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

activeSkills.name: Heat Paralysis
activeSkills.description: All non-water units on the battlefield are stunned for 150TU. Ally Stun Absorbers do not redirect this stun, and allies will not be stunned by this effect if there is an enemy Stun Absorber on the battlefield. This skill becomes locked for 150TU after use.

activeSkills.name: Piercing Heat
activeSkills.description:
Targets 2 other random allies. Those allies are healed for 100% of max HP, are granted the Burn status effect, and Piercing. This skill locks after use, and unlocks when this unit damages an enemy with an attack. Cannot be used if the user is alone on the battlefield.

A unit with Piercing will have their Attacks ignore enemy damage reduction effects until the end of their next turn.

activeSkills.name: Dragon Slam
activeSkills.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy, and exchanges the user's current HP with the amount of HP the user has currently lost. 600% damage instead if the user has 3 Charges. Allies gain Spirit equal to the number of units that were Burning at the start of the turn. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable only if the user's HP is at 50% or less.

activeSkills.name: Heating Up
activeSkills.description:
200% damage to 1 enemy. 400% damage instead if the user has survived for 150TU on the battlefield. 600% damage instead if the user has survived for 300TU on the battlefield. 800% damage instead if the user has survived for 450TU on the battlefield. The user is then granted the Burn status effect. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects.

Burn will overwrite other status effects on the user. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

activeSkills.name: Blaze Onward
activeSkills.description: Heals all allies for 800% of the user's attack. Then immediately give 2 other random burning allies the next turns by reducing their current TU. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill. This skill locks after use, and unlocks each time a non-conjured unit on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source.

activeSkills.name: Deadly Burn Blast
activeSkills.description: 300% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect.

activeSkills.name: Silver Sky Slash
activeSkills.description: 500% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. Locked for 100TU after the user has entered the battlefield, and becomes locked for 100TU after use.

activeSkills.name: Magical Barrage
activeSkills.description:
200% damage to all enemies. If an enemy is poisoned or sleeping, deals 400% damage instead. Allies gain 1 Spirit for each poisoned and sleeping enemy hit. If no enemies are poisoned or sleeping already, each enemy hit is randomly granted either the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU or the Lethal Poison status effect for 999TU. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

Cursed Sleep will overwrite status effects other than Burn, cannot be overwritten by Poison, can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage caused by Dream Hunter type active skills. Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.

activeSkills.name: Dark Shroud
activeSkills.description:
All non-burning allies will have the TU costs for all of their skills reduced by 20%. This will overwrite the effects of other Quicken skills on affected units. Then grants all allies Stealth, a Stealth Shield, a random ward (either Poison, Stun, or Sleep), and heals them for 500% of the user's attack. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on affected units. Stealth Shields prevent the next other status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

activeSkills.name: Rewind Time
activeSkills.description: Removes all Poison and Sleep wards from enemy units on the battlefield. Then pulls the user away from the battlefield to be next in line of your reinforcements. If there are no ally reinforcements, adds enough Super Chimori's to the ally team to still pull the user away to reinforcements (max 4 if the user is alone on the battlefield). Usable if the user has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Magical Ruin
activeSkills.description: 600% damage to 2 enemies if they are sleeping or poisoned. 800% damage instead to targets that have the Cursed Sleep or Lethal Poison status effects. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, and heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt. All non-burning, non-poisoned, non-sleeping enemies hit are then randomly granted either Cursed Sleep for 200TU or Lethal Poison for 999TU.

activeSkills.name: Time Spears
activeSkills.description:
Targets 1 enemy and ignores Guardians. If the target has 50TU or more, or if Time Stop is active, deals 600% damage.

If Time Stop is not active, Stuns the target for 300TU, then if the hit target has 200TU or more and is not a Stun Absorber, they can no longer be Stunned by this active skill unless they leave the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Time Stop
activeSkills.description:
Activates Time Stop For 100TU. While Time Stop is active, the user:
- Cannot be defeated by Poison or Burn damage (including Lethal Poison).
- Is immune to Poison, and Burn status effects.
- Has their Active Skill TU Costs reduced by 50%. This does not stack with Quicken effects.
- Disables the Active Skills of all other units on the battlefield (including new units that enter from reinforcements).

When Time Stop expires, all allies will be healed for 100% of max HP and be Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed), and all non-boss enemies on the battlefield that are below 10% of their max HP will be immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated those enemies with an attack). This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the enemy from being defeated. Time Stop expiring may trigger before or after other effects.

Usable once per battle. The effects of Time Stop cannot be Purified and will be cancelled if the user is defeated. When a unit's Active Skills are disabled and they get the turn, they will lose the turn as if they were sleeping.

activeSkills.name: Undo Existence
activeSkills.description: Immediately defeats 2 non-boss enemies that have 300TU or more, (the user is considered to have defeated those enemies with an attack). Then for each enemy that is defeated, Allies gain 2 Spirit. This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, and cannot be redirected by Guardians. Usable if 2 or more enemies have 300TU or more and only once per battle.

activeSkills.name: Sands of Time
activeSkills.description: 200% damage to 1 enemy, plus 200% for each time this unit has defeated an enemy with an attack while on the battlefield (max of 1000% total damage after defeating 4 enemies). This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

activeSkills.name: Storm of Blades
activeSkills.description: 200% damage to 1 enemy. If the user has a Power Charge, it will be consumed to deal 400% damage instead and the user will immediately get the next turn. This extra turn may be interrupted by other effects that influence the turn order (e.g. stuns targeting the lowest TU target). This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

activeSkills.name: Stun Barrage
activeSkills.description: Stun a random enemy for 100TU, this effect triggers 4 times. If the user has a Power Charge, it will be consumed to trigger this effect 8 times instead. This skill locks after each use until the user defeats a non-conjured enemy on the battlefield with an attack. Usable 3 times per battle.

activeSkills.name: Divine Blast
activeSkills.description: 300% damage to 2 enemies. For each target with 50+ TU, deals 400% damage to that target instead. For each target with 100+ TU, deals 600% damage to that target instead. If at least one of the hit enemies is not defeated by this attack, the user gains a Power Charge. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. Power Charges cannot stack and will be removed when the user leaves the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Declare Victory
activeSkills.description: Immediately defeats 1 non-boss enemy. The user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful. This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable if the user has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield, and there is only 1 enemy unit left on the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Lethal Plague
activeSkills.description:
Grants 1 enemy the Lethal Poison status effect, and Infects them with it.

After the end of each turn, this infection will trigger to apply Lethal Poison to a random non-burning, non-Lethal Poisoned unit on the infected unit's team. Infection ends after 3 triggers (even if they find no valid target) or once the infected enemy is defeated or leaves the battlefield. Infection is not a status effect and cannot be prevented or purified, but the status effect spread by the infection may be. A unit cannot get a new infection until their existing one ends.

This skill is locked for 100TU after use. Usable 5 times per battle.

Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects, lasts 999 TU, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison, and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning or Boss units.

activeSkills.name: Throw Knives
activeSkills.description:
500% damage to 1 random enemy. Minus 100% damage for each non-poisoned enemy on the battlefield (max of -400% if there are 4 non-poisoned enemies). This attack cannot be redirected by Guardians, and ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

Then the target hit has its Poison Wards removed, burn removed (including Mega Healing Burn) and is randomly granted either Super Poison, Mega Poison for 200TU, or Lethal Poison for 999TU. This will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. If this skill is used 3 times within 10TU, it becomes locked for 50TU.

Super Poison deals 4 times the damage of normal poison, and cannot be overwritten by normal poison. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

activeSkills.name: Massacre
activeSkills.description: 100% damage to all enemies, plus 100% for each time this skill has already been used while on the battlefield (max of 400% total damage). This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

activeSkills.name: Death's Kiss
activeSkills.description: Immediately defeats 1 non-boss enemy that has 50% or less of max HP, the user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful. This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, and cannot be redirected by Guardians. Usable if all enemies on the battlefield are poisoned. Usable 3 times per battle.

activeSkills.name: Queen's Slash
activeSkills.description: 200% damage to 2 enemies. Every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield, this skill will randomly deal either 400% or 600% damage instead. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills.

activeSkills.name: Afternoon Tea
activeSkills.description:
Grants all enemies the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Then for each enemy that is not asleep (e.g. due to a Sleep Ward), allies gain 3 Spirit.

This skill becomes locked for 150TU after use. If all enemy units on the battlefield are Fire or have Burn Blast, or Burn Drive type active skills, this skill becomes locked for 100TU after use instead.

activeSkills.name: Dream Shatter
activeSkills.description: Targets 1 enemy. This attack ignores damage reduction effects and does not wake sleeping targets. If the target is sleeping, deals 600% damage. Then if the hit target is sleeping, non-boss, non-Ephemeral and has 1HP remaining, it is immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated that enemy with an attack). This secondary effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the enemy from being defeated.

activeSkills.name: Queen's Drive
activeSkills.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Removes any Sleep Wards from hit targets. Usable only if allies have 6 or more Spirit. If this skill is used 3 times within 10TU, it becomes locked for 100TU.

activeSkills.name: Dark Drain
activeSkills.description:
Grants all allies Stealth, and a Burn Ward. Grants all enemies the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Then steals up to 1 Spirit from the enemy team for each Poisoned enemy on the battlefield. The user will immediately get the next turn, then this additional turn effect cannot trigger again until TU advances.

Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth. Burn Wards prevent Burn from being applied once, then are removed. Burn Wards cannot stack.

activeSkills.name: Degrading Slice
activeSkills.description:
Damage to 2 enemies depending on the enemy team's Spirit:
- 6+ Enemy Spirit: 250%
- 4-5 Enemy Spirit: 400%
- 1-3 Enemy Spirit: 550%
- 0 Enemy Spirit: 700%
This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

activeSkills.name: Unleash Chaos
activeSkills.description:
Heals all allies for 1000% of the user's attack. Steals all Spirit from the enemy team. The Hold Ground+ passive skill effect is reset for the user and can be triggered again. Then the user enters Chaos Rage for 100TU. While in Chaos Rage, the user's attack is increased by 1.5x (this does not stack with Enrage effects), and the user cannot fall asleep, or be stunned. The user cannot enter Chaos Rage while there are any allies with Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skills on the battlefield.

This skill is locked until the user's Hold Ground+ passive skill effect is triggered while on the battlefield and is locked again after each use. This skill can be used only three times per battle.

activeSkills.name: Full Force
activeSkills.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Usable if the user is not a Guardian.

activeSkills.name: Lightning Bolts
activeSkills.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy, and a random enemy is Stunned for 100TU. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Then the user becomes Enraged. This unit will immediately get the next turn if this is the first time this skill has been used while on the battlefield or if this unit has used any other active skill since this skill was last used.

An Enraged unit's attack is increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Enrage will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on the user.

activeSkills.name: Divine Winds
activeSkills.description:
Allies gain 1 Spirit, then ally Spirit is doubled. Enemy Spirit is halved (rounded down) then enemies lose 1 Spirit. (e.g. Enemies have 7 Spirit -> 3 then minus 1 = 2).

All allies are Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed), and a random enemy is Stunned for 100TU. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield, and cannot be used for 50TU after each use.

activeSkills.name: Divine Lightning
activeSkills.description:
Targets all enemies and deals 100% damage. For each target with 50+ TU, deals 400% damage to that target instead. For each target with 100+ TU, deals 600% damage to that target instead. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

Then, all non-boss, non-Ephemeral enemies hit that have 1HP remaining have a 25% chance each to be immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated that enemy with an attack). This secondary effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the enemy from being defeated. Usable once each time this unit is on the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Call the Storm
activeSkills.description: Pulls the user away from the battlefield to be next in line of your reinforcements. If there are no ally reinforcements, adds enough Super Denmoris to the ally team to still pull the user away to reinforcements (max 4 if the user is alone on the battlefield). Usable if the user has used Divine Lightning while on the battlefield. Usable five times per battle.

activeSkills.name: Mega Poison Jolt
activeSkills.description:
250% damage to 2 enemies. 500% damage instead if the user has stealth. This attack ignores the Stealth Status Effect, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. All enemies hit are then granted Mega Poison for 200TU and are Stunned for 30TU. The user is granted Stealth, and a Stealth Shield.

Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on those enemies. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next other status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

activeSkills.name: Shadow Rift
activeSkills.description: Targets 1 enemy. If an enemy is poisoned, deals 400% damage. If the user has survived for 200TU+ on the battlefield, 600% damage instead. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. The user recovers HP to 100% of its own max if damage is dealt.

activeSkills.name: Crippling Toxin
activeSkills.description:
Stuns 1 Mega Poisoned enemy for 200TU. Then, grants them a Burn Ward and the Lethal Poison status effect for 999TU. These effects can only apply if the target is Mega Poisoned. This skill can be redirected by enemy Stun Absorbers. Usable only if there is no more than 1 enemy with the Lethal Poison status effect on the battlefield, and cannot be used if there is a non-Mega Poisoned enemy Stun Absorber on the battlefield.

Burn Wards prevent Burn from being applied once, then are removed. Burn Wards cannot stack. Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.

activeSkills.name: Lunar Hypnosis
activeSkills.description:
Hypnotizes an enemy with the lowest TU and Mega Poisons them for 200TU. A Hypnotized enemy will use its next turn to grant the turn to and Purify the hypnotizer (the turn will be lost as if it were sleeping), and then the hypnosis will end.

This skill becomes locked for 90TU after use (minus 10TU per Awakening the user has) and cannot be used if an enemy is already Hypnotized or if there are less than 2 enemies on the battlefield. Hypnosis will fail against Boss units. Hypnosis is not a status effect and cannot be removed by Purify skills, but will be canceled if the user is defeated or leaves the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Tandem Takedown
activeSkills.description:
250% damage to 1 enemy. 500% damage instead if another ally on the battlefield has 50TU or less. Then immediately give an ally with the lowest TU (excluding the user) the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill. This skill can be used on such turns, but will not grant the extra turn. The given turn is granted after Counter Stance or Counter Skin type effects triggered by this attack, and so the affected ally will act before a countering enemy. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the given turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

activeSkills.name: En Garde
activeSkills.description:
Weakens all enemies. The user is Enraged, granted a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, Poison Ward, Counter Stance for 150TU and 80% damage reduction from attacks until the end of its next turn. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

This will overwrite the effects of previous Weak or Enrage skills on affected units, and other status effects on the user. For 150TU, the next time the unit with counter stance takes damage from an enemy attack, it will become their turn. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

activeSkills.name: Double Phoenix
activeSkills.description: 700% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores the Stealth Status Effect. The Hold Ground+ passive skill effect is reset for the user and can be triggered again. Unlocked for one use each time the user's Hold Ground+ passive skill effect is triggered while on the battlefield and can be used only three times per battle.

activeSkills.name: Survivor's Blade
activeSkills.description:
This attack ignores Guardians. 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

Locked for 200TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Suppressing Fire
activeSkills.description:
Weakens all enemies, and grants them a Rage Ward. Enrages all allies. Then immediately give 1 other random ally the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill. This skill can be used on such turns, but will not grant the extra turn.

Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. These effects will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on affected units. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects. Rage Wards will prevent a unit from becoming Enraged once, then be removed. Rage Wards cannot stack.

activeSkills.name: Ironclad
activeSkills.description: The user is Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed) and healed for 100% of max HP. For 100TU, the user cannot be defeated and is immune to Poison, Burn and Sleep status effects. When this effect expires, all other allies will be healed for 100% of their max HP and be Purified. This skill can only be used once each time this unit is on the battlefield, and only if there is no other non-Mori Guardian on the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Victory Cannon
activeSkills.description:
1500% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

Unlocked each time a non-conjured enemy or non-conjured ally is defeated or sacrificed by any source other than the user. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield, and cannot be used for 50TU after each use.

activeSkills.name: Sound the Alarm
activeSkills.description: Grants 2 random enemies the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Pulls the user away from the battlefield to be next in line of your reinforcements. If there are no ally reinforcements, adds enough Super Suimori to the ally team to still pull the user away to reinforcements (max 3 if the user has only 1 other ally on the battlefield). Locked for 150TU after the user has entered the battlefield, and cannot be used if the user has no other allies on the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Circuit Overload
activeSkills.description:
Targets 2 enemies and deals 100% damage. For each target with 50+ TU:
- Steals 1 Spirit from enemies if that target is hit.
- Deals 500% damage to that target instead.
- Deals 750% damage to that target instead if the target has 100+TU.

activeSkills.name: Mass Surge
activeSkills.description:
Heals the user for 30% of max HP, and the user is granted a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, and Poison Ward. All other allies heal for 100% of their max HP. Then all allies are Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed), and granted Recovery Mist for 200TU. Usable 10 times per battle.

Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack. A unit with Recovery Mist will heal for 5% of their max HP and have a 30% chance to be Purified after every turn. Recovery Mist effects do not stack.

activeSkills.name: Modular Shot
activeSkills.description:
1250% damage to 2 enemies. Unlocked each time an ally on the battlefield is defeated by an attack while this unit is on the battlefield. If that ally was:
- Water, this attack grants hit targets Sleep (Forced) for 200TU.
- Fire, this attack grants all allies the Burn status effect.
- Storm, this attack grants hit targets Stun for 200TU.
- Earth, this attack grants hit targets Cursed Sleep for 200TU (blocked by Burn).
- Light, this attack heals all allies for 100% of max HP and Purifies them.
- Dark, this attack grants hit targets Mega Poison for 200TU.
Successfully applied Status Effects will overwrite existing status effects on affected units.

This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. The Elemental effect will be determined at the time this skill unlocks. When multiple allies are defeated at the same time, only one Element will be considered.

activeSkills.name: Crashing Heavens
activeSkills.description: Stuns all enemies for 500TU. This Stun cannot be redirected by enemy Stun Absorbers. Locked for 300TU after the user has entered the battlefield. Usable once per battle.

activeSkills.name: Blot Out
activeSkills.description:
Damage to 1 enemy and Weaken them. Then enemies lose Spirit equal to the number of Element types that remain on the battlefield.

Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

activeSkills.name: Paint Fall
activeSkills.description:
50% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills, the Stealth Status Effect, and the Counter Stance Status Effect. Randomly grants all allies either Stun Wards, or Sleep Wards. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

Then heals all allies for 200% of the user's attack. This triggers once for each Element type that remains on the battlefield.

Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Stroke of Genius
activeSkills.description: Damage 1 enemy. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. 300% damage instead if the user or target have defeated 1 unit with an attack while on the battlefiled. 400% damage instead if the user or target have defeated 2+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Masterpiece
activeSkills.description:
Immediately defeats 1 non-boss enemy, the user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful. This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, and cannot be redirected by Guardians.

Locked for 300TU after the user has entered the battlefield. This lock is ignored while all 6 Element types are on the battlefield. Usable twice per battle.

activeSkills.name: Dragon Fang
activeSkills.description:
Damage to 2 Enemies, 500% damage instead if the user is burning. Then the user is granted the Burn status effect. This attack ignores the Stealth Status Effect. This unit will immediately get the next turn if this is the first time this skill has been used while on the battlefield or if this unit has used Incinerate since this skill was last used.

Burn will overwrite other status effects on the user. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Burn will gain the Burn status effect.

activeSkills.name: Dragon Breath
activeSkills.description:
Enrages 2 allies, grants them the burn status effect, and heals them for 100% of max HP. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

This will overwrite the effects of previous Enrage skills. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

activeSkills.name: Incinerate
activeSkills.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy. 800% damage instead if this is the first time this skill has been used while on the battlefield. This attack ignores effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect.

activeSkills.name: Rising Dragon
activeSkills.description: Grants all enemies the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Pulls the user away from the battlefield to be next in line of your reinforcements. If there are no ally reinforcements, adds enough Super Himoris to the ally team to still pull the user away to reinforcements (max 4 if the user is alone on the battlefield). Usable if the user has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Demon Hellball
activeSkills.description:
200% damage to 1 enemy, plus 200% for each Charge stored on the user (max of 800% total damage). This attack heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt, ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

The user and target are both granted the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

Stuns for 50TU one other non-water, burning enemy per Charge stored on the user (max of 3 targets).

activeSkills.name: Mass Dismissal
activeSkills.description: Immediately defeats all conjured, non-boss units on both sides of the battlefield. Allies gain 2 Spirit and the enemy team loses 2 Spirit for each unit defeated in this way. The user is considered to have defeated with attacks as many units as are defeated this way (even if they were Ephemeral). This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the targets from being defeated. This skill becomes locked for 150TU after use.

activeSkills.name: Devil's Fury
activeSkills.description:
200% damage to 2 enemies, plus 200% for each Charge stored on the user (max of 800% damage). This attack ignores the Stealth status effect, and effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated. The user gains the Mega Healing Burn status effect for 100TU.

Usable if the user has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield or if all enemy units on the battlefield are Fire or have Burn Blast, or Burn Drive type active skills. A unit with Mega Healing Burn will heal after each turn at 20 times the rate as Healing Burn. This will overwrite other status effects on the user, cannot be overwritten by Burn, Poison or Sleep status effects, and cannot be Purified. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Mega Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. A unit with Mega Healing Burn will be granted Healing Burn for 300TU when Mega Healing Burn expires.

activeSkills.name: Deal with the Devil
activeSkills.description:
Enrages 1 other ally, grants them the burn status effect, and immediately gives them the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill. This skill locks after use, and unlocks when this unit damages an enemy with an attack. This is not considered a Combo Burst type active skill.

This will overwrite the effects of previous Enrage skills. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

activeSkills.name: Star Sweep
activeSkills.description: 250% damage to all enemies and heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. Steals up to 1 Spirit from enemies for each enemy hit.

activeSkills.name: Cosmic Cannon
activeSkills.description:
Consumes a Power Charge. 400% damage to 1 enemy, and then grants that enemy the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This attack ignores damage reduction effects. Sleep will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Usable only if the user has a Power Charge.

If damage from this attack defeats a non-conjured enemy, another random non-boss, non-Ephemeral enemy on the battlefield will be immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated that enemy with an attack). This secondary effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the random enemy from being defeated.

activeSkills.name: Astral Ascension
activeSkills.description:
600% damage to 2 enemies, the user is granted Recovery Mist for 100TU and cannot be Stunned for 100TU. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. If damage is dealt to 2 targets, the user will immediately get the next turn by having its TU reduced to 0. Usable if the user has defeated 2+ units with attacks while on the battlefield. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

A unit with Recovery Mist will heal for 5% of their max HP and have a 30% chance to be Purified after every turn. Recovery Mist effects do not stack.

activeSkills.name: Grand Design
activeSkills.description:
Heals all allies for 500% of the user's attack. The user is granted a Power Charge.

The user gains one of the following effects at random:
- The user's next attack to hit while on the battlefield ignores effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target(s) from being defeated.
- The user's next attack to hit while on the battlefield immediately gives the user the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

Usable only if the user has no Power Charge. Power Charges can be consumed by certain skills to activate or enhance their effects. Power Charges will be removed if this unit leaves the battlefield. Power Charges cannot stack.

activeSkills.name: Clean Strike
activeSkills.description: 100% damage to 1 enemy. 600% damage instead and this unit will immediately get the next turn if this is the first time this skill has been used while on the battlefield or if this unit has used Sakura Storm since this skill was last used. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

activeSkills.name: Sakura Storm
activeSkills.description: 200% damage to all enemies, plus 100% for each Charge stored on the user (max of 500% total damage). This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

activeSkills.name: Healing Blossom
activeSkills.description:
Heals the user fully, and Purifies them (removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison). The user is granted a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, Poison Ward, and will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use. If the user has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield, this skill becomes locked for 100TU after use instead.

Endure effects cannot stack. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

activeSkills.name: Swallow's Flight
activeSkills.description: Immediately defeats 1 non-boss enemy that has survived for 200TU or more on the battlefield, the user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful. This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, and cannot be redirected by Guardians. Usable if the user has 2+ Charges stored and only 3 times per battle. Consumes 2 Charges on the user.

activeSkills.name: Fireworks
activeSkills.description:
50% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores any enemy status effects (including Stealth), damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. All enemies hit by this attack will become Weakened, this will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on those units.

Adds a Shadow Double to the next in line of allied reinforcements if a Shadow Double is not next in line in allied reinforcements. This Shadow Double's Level, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon, and Accessory will match the user. Then if 4 allies were already on the battlefield, the user exchanges themselves with the next unit in allied reinforcements. Usable if this unit's active skill Assassinate is locked.

Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

activeSkills.name: Stealth Flank

400% damage to 1 enemy, and immediately gives 1 other random ally with a Stealth Strike type active skill the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0. Usable only if the user has the Stealth status effect. This attack ignores any enemy status effects, damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

Stealth Strike type active skills are any skills that are unlocked while their user has Stealth.

activeSkills.name: Assassinate
activeSkills.description:
500% damage to 1 enemy. Then, if that target is not burning, they are granted Lethal Poison for 999TU. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Unlocked each time the user enters the battle from reinforcements. This skill is locked again after each use.

Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.

activeSkills.name: Art of Cloning
activeSkills.description:
Adds a Shadow Double to the next in line of allied reinforcements, and adds another 6 Shadow Doubles to random places in allied reinforcements. These Shadow Doubles' Levels, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon, and Accessories will match the user.

Then if 4 allies were already on the battlefield, the user sends themself to the back of allied reinforcements.

Usable if the user has been on the battlefield since the very start of battle, or if there are no allied reinforcements. Cannot be used if there are any Shadow Doubles among allies on the battlefield or allied reinforcements.

activeSkills.name: Cursed Bouquet

Grants 1 non-burning enemy the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU, and the user is granted Stealth, and a Stealth Shield. Usable if the user does not have the Stealth status effect.

Cursed Sleep will overwrite status effects other than Burn, cannot be overwritten by Poison, can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage caused by Dream Hunter type active skills. Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next other status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

activeSkills.name: Stealth Rampage
activeSkills.description: 300% damage to 1 enemy. 500% damage instead if the user has defeated 1+ enemies with attacks while on the battlefield. This attack ignores any enemy status effects, damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. Usable only if the user has the Stealth status effect.

Unlocked the first time an ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source while this unit is on the battlefield or if this unit is on the battlefield at the very start of the battle. This skill is locked again if the user leaves the battlefield. This skill can only be used once each time this unit is on the battlefield.
