activeSkills.name: Boundless Slash
activeSkills.description:
500% damage to 1 enemy, and the user is granted Stealth, a Stealth Shield, and 3 Charges. This attack ignores damage reduction effects.

The next damage the user deals with an Attack while on the battlefield will ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable only if the user has no Charges stored.

activeSkills.name: Trinity Onslaught
activeSkills.description:
Damage 2 enemies, and then grants those enemies the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU if they are left with below 25% of max HP. 300% damage to targets that have survived 100TU or more, and are not burning. 600% damage to targets that have survived 200TU or more, and are not burning. This attack ignores damage reduction effects.

Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on affected enemies. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

activeSkills.name: Spirit Blast
activeSkills.description:
50% damage to 1 enemy. 300% damage instead every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield. The user is granted Stealth, a Stealth Shield, and allies randomly gain either 3, 5 or 9 Spirit. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next other status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

activeSkills.name: Stealth Punisher
activeSkills.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies. Heals the user for 100% of max HP if damage is dealt. Allies gain 1 Spirit for each ally that has the Stealth status effect. Usable only if the user has the Stealth status effect. This attack ignores any enemy status effects (including Stealth), damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills.

activeSkills.name: Excessive Force
activeSkills.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores any enemy status effects, damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills. Usable only if the user has the Stealth status effect, and allies have 6 or more Spirit. If this skill is used 3 times within 10TU, it becomes locked for 50TU.

activeSkills.name: Veil of Dread
activeSkills.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy if they are a Guardian. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable only if the user has no ally Guardian on the battlefield, and there is a Guardian among enemies on the battlefield. This skill becomes locked for 200TU after use.

activeSkills.name: Draining Shadow
activeSkills.description:
Grants 1 enemy the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU, and the user is granted Stealth, and a Stealth Shield. Steals up to 2 Spirit from enemies.

This will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next other status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

activeSkills.name: Dread Fumes
activeSkills.description:
Grants all non-burning allies Stealth, a Stealth Shield, and heals them for 500% of the user's attack. This will overwrite other status effects on those allies. Allies gain 1 Spirit for each Poisoned or Sleeping enemy on the battlefield. Then each non-burning enemy is randomly granted either Mega Poison for 200TU or Cursed Sleep for 200TU.

Unlocked each time a non-conjured enemy on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. Cursed Sleep will overwrite status effects other than Burn, cannot be overwritten by Poison, can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage caused by Dream Hunter type active skills.

activeSkills.name: Dread Serpent
activeSkills.description: Damages all enemies, 600% damage instead to all Poisoned or Sleeping enemies. This attack ignores damage reduction effects. All non-burning, non-sleeping enemies hit are then granted Mega Poison for 200TU. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

activeSkills.name: Creeping Death
activeSkills.description:
600% damage to 1 enemy. Then, if that target is not burning, they are granted Lethal Poison for 999TU. Usable only if the user has Stealth. This skill is locked for 150TU after use.

Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.

activeSkills.name: Revolution!
activeSkills.description: 50% damage to all enemies, 200% damage if user has survived on the battlefield for 200TU or more. Allies gain 1 Spirit for each enemy hit at 50+ TU in the turn order, or 2 Spirit for each at 100+ TU. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

activeSkills.name: Stun Cannon
activeSkills.description:
Targets 2 random enemies, they are each randomly granted either Stun for 50TU, 100TU, or 200TU. The user is granted 1 Charge. This skill is locked until the end of the user's next turn after each use.

Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Time Shockwave
activeSkills.description: 100% damage to 2 enemies. 400% damage if the target has 50TU or more. 600% damage if the target has 100TU or more. 800% damage if the target has 150TU or more. For each target hit but not defeated by this attack, Stun 1 random enemy that was not hit by this attack for 100TU.

activeSkills.name: Glorious Cannon
activeSkills.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy, plus 100% per Awakening the user has (800% max). This attack ignores damage reduction effects. Usable only if the user has stored 3 Charges. This skill becomes locked for 75TU after use.

activeSkills.name: Infect Reality
activeSkills.description:
300% damage to 2 random enemies. This attack cannot be redirected by Guardians, and will ignore the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. This attack can hit targets that have the Stealth Status Effect or a passive effect that ignores multiple target attacks.

Consumes 1 charge on the user and unlocks at random either Mind Piercer or No One Is Safe. This skill becomes locked after use until the user uses another active skill. This skill is locked if the user has no Charges.

activeSkills.name: Mind Piercer
activeSkills.description: 600% damage to 1 random enemy. This attack cannot be redirected by Guardians. This skill is locked until it becomes unlocked by Infect Reality. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: No One Is Safe
activeSkills.description: 300% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores the Stealth Status Effect. Heals all allies for 800% of the user's Attack. Sets both enemy and ally Spirit to 5. This skill is locked until it becomes unlocked by Infect Reality. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Reset Reality
activeSkills.description: The user has all Sleep immunities, Sleep Wards and Stealth Shields removed. Then, the user is healed for 100% of max HP, granted 3 Charges, and Sleep for 100TU, even if they have already slept. A random enemy is also granted Sleep for 200TU, even if they have already slept. The next time the user is awake at the end of a turn, they will be healed for 100% of max HP, and have their current TU reduced by 100. Usable only if the user has no Charges stored.

activeSkills.name: Discharge Strike
activeSkills.description:
Damage to 1 enemy, the user is granted a Sleep Ward. If this hits an enemy with any Discharge Counters, they will be stunned for:

300TU if they have 3 Discharge Counters
200TU if they have 2 Discharge Counters
100TU if they have 1 Discharge Counter

Then, the target has 1 Discharge Counter removed. Sleep Ward prevents Sleep from being applied once, then is removed. Sleep Wards cannot stack.

activeSkills.name: Instant Push Back
activeSkills.description: Pushes 1 enemy away from the battlefield to be next in line of the enemy reinforcements. This skill can only be used if there are 1 or more enemy reinforcements left. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

activeSkills.name: Magical Experience
activeSkills.description:
Immediately give 1 other random ally the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0, and Purifies them (removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison). Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill.

This skill becomes locked after use until the user deals damage with an Attack. This skill cannot be used if this unit is alone on the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Rainbow Raid
activeSkills.description:
600% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated.

Locked for 300TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Stealth Blast
activeSkills.description:
50% damage to 1 enemy. 300% damage instead every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield. The user is granted Stealth, and a Stealth Shield. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next other status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

activeSkills.name: Waves of Sleep
activeSkills.description: Grants 2 enemies the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield, and the user is granted Stealth, and a Stealth Shield. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. This is not considered a Combo Burst type active skill.

activeSkills.name: Knockout Storm
activeSkills.description:
500% damage to 1 enemy, and then grants that enemy the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield if they are left with below 50% of max HP. This attack ignores damage reduction effects. Sleep will overwrite other status effects on that enemy.

This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use. Usable if the user has the Stealth status effect or at the cost of consuming 1 charge if the user has no stealth. This is considered a Stealth Strike type skill.

activeSkills.name: Unending Nightmare
activeSkills.description: Targets 1 enemy. If the target is sleeping, deals 600% damage, grants them the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even though they have already slept while on the battlefield, and allies gain 4 Spirit.

activeSkills.name: Golden Sandstorm
activeSkills.description: 50% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. This skill locks after use, and unlocks when this unit damages an enemy with another attack.

activeSkills.name: Lamp Blast
activeSkills.description: 100% damage to 2 enemies. 400% damage if the user's HP is at 75%+. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

activeSkills.name: Instant Give Turn
activeSkills.description: Immediately give 1 other ally the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill.

activeSkills.name: Big Awesome Move
activeSkills.description:
800% damage to 1 enemy, and randomly grants that enemy either Stun for 200TU, Mega Poison for 200TU, or Sleep for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and revenge passive skills. If Ally Spirit is at 0, allies gain 5 Spirit. If Ally Spirit is at 10, allies lose 5 Spirit. Usable if allies have 0 or 10 Spirit.

Sleep and Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

activeSkills.name: Sister Strike
activeSkills.description: 100% damage to 1 enemy. 600% damage if "Frankenstein, Twin Horrors" is in the ally team, including reinforcements.

activeSkills.name: Doll Harvest
activeSkills.description: 600% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. If damage is dealt, the user is granted a Power Charge, fully healed, and all ally "Frankenstein, Twin Horrors" on the battlefield are fully healed. Usable if the user is below 50% of max HP or if "Frankenstein, Twin Horrors" is among allies on the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Maximum Output
activeSkills.description: Consumes a Power Charge for 600% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, the effects of Skin passive skills, and enemy damage reduction effects. Usable only if the user has a Power Charge.

activeSkills.name: Mary's Monster
activeSkills.description: Sacrifices the user to revive the Frankenstein that conjured the user to the battlefield with full HP. Usable only if the user doesn't have "Frankenstein, Twin Horrors" in the ally team, including reinforcements. The revived Frankenstein will be considered a conjured unit.

activeSkills.name: Sister Strike
activeSkills.description: 100% damage to 1 enemy. 600% damage if "Mary, Guardian Angel on Strings" is in the ally team, including reinforcements.

activeSkills.name: Protective Sister
activeSkills.description: For 100TU, the user becomes a Guardian and gains 50% damage reduction from attacks. While this unit is a Guardian, for any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage. Usable if "Mary, Guardian Angel on Strings" is among allies on the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Energy Infusion
activeSkills.description:
Immediately give 1 other ally "Mary, Guardian Angel on Strings" the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0, Purifies them (removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison), and grants them a Power Charge.

This skill becomes locked for 150TU after use. Power Charges can be consumed by certain skills to activate or enhance their effects. Power Charges will be removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield. Power Charges cannot stack.

activeSkills.name: It's Alive!
activeSkills.description:
Adds "Mary, Guardian Angel on Strings" to the next in line of allied reinforcements. This Mary's Level, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon, and Accessory will match the user.

Then if 4 allies are on the battlefield, the user exchanges themselves with the Mary added to allied reinforcements. Usable only if the user doesn't have "Mary, Guardian Angel on Strings" in the ally team, including reinforcements. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use, and is usable 10 times per battle.

activeSkills.name: Regal Barrage
activeSkills.description: 100% damage to 2 enemies. 400% damage instead if the user has stealth. Heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt. This attack ignores any enemy status effects (including Stealth), damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills. This is considered a Stealth Strike type skill.

activeSkills.name: King's Shield
activeSkills.description:
Heals the user fully. The user is granted a Power Charge, Stealth, a Stealth Shield, a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, and Poison Ward. Usable only if the user has no Power Charge. Usable 5 times per battle.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next other status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

Power Charges can be consumed by certain skills to activate or enhance their effects. Power Charges will be removed if this unit leaves the battlefield. Power Charges cannot stack.

activeSkills.name: Regal Wavemaster
activeSkills.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy if they have 150TU or more in the turn order. If this damage does not defeat the target, allies gain 2 Spirit. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

activeSkills.name: Regal Cornobble
activeSkills.description:
500% damage to 1 enemy and Weakens them (reduces their Attack to 0.75x until the end of their next turn). Heals the user fully. The user is granted Stealth. Usable only if the user has a Power Charge. This does not consume the Power Charge.

Weak will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on the target and can be overwritten by Enrage effects. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects.

activeSkills.name: Lone Wolf
activeSkills.description: 200% damage to 1 enemy, plus 200% for each time this unit has defeated an enemy with an attack or Absolute Zero while on the battlefield (max of 1000% total damage after defeating 4 enemies). This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects.

activeSkills.name: Glacial Slash
activeSkills.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. Usable 10 times per battle.

activeSkills.name: Absolute Zero
activeSkills.description: Immediately defeats 1 non-boss enemy that has 10% or less of max HP, the user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful. This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, and cannot be redirected by Guardians.

activeSkills.name: Dual Heaven Style
activeSkills.description:
The user is granted a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, Poison Ward, will enter Dual Heaven Stance for 200TU and Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. While in Dual Heaven Stance, this unit heals for 50% of max HP at the end of each turn, and this unit's Attack is increased to 1.5x. This attack increase does not stack with Enrage effects.

This skill becomes locked for 200TU after use. Usable if this unit has not defeated any units with attacks or Absolute Zero while on the battlefield. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards and Endure effects cannot stack.

activeSkills.name: Dragonfire Dance
activeSkills.description: 100% damage to 1 enemy. 300% damage instead and this unit will immediately get the next turn if this was not the last attack used by this unit while on the battlefield. This attack ignores skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Heatwave is not considered an attack.

activeSkills.name: Heatwave
activeSkills.description:
The user is granted the Burn status effect and is fully healed. Each other unit on the battlefield has a 50% chance of being burned and then stunned for 100TU. Burn will overwrite other status effects on affected units. Then allies gain Spirit equal to the number of burning allies on the battlefield.

Usable if the user is not burning or if allies have 1 or less Spirit. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

activeSkills.name: Hellfire
activeSkills.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy, 600% damage if the target has 100TU or more. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect.

activeSkills.name: Scorched Earth
activeSkills.description:
500% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated.

Locked for 200TU after the user has entered the battlefield, and locks again for 200TU after each use.

activeSkills.name: Surgical Strike
activeSkills.description:
Targets 1 enemy and ignores Guardians. If no enemies are sleeping, deals 100% damage, and then grants that enemy the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. Sleep will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. If an enemy is sleeping, deals 400% damage instead, Weakens the target and grants the user a Power Charge.

Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. Weakening will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on the target and can be overwritten by Enrage effects. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects.

Power Charges can be consumed by certain skills to activate or enhance their effects. Power Charges will be removed if this unit leaves the battlefield. Power Charges cannot stack.

activeSkills.name: Golden Purify
activeSkills.description:
Removes negative status effects like Sleep, Burn or Poison from 2 other allies and grants them either a Sleep Ward or Poison Ward at random. If a status effect is removed by this skill, the user is Enraged. Allies gain 1 Spirit for each status effect removed by this skill. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

An Enraged unit's attack is increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Enrage will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on the user. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack. Cannot be used if the user is alone on the battlefield, and will not remove negative status effects from the user if they are targeted.

activeSkills.name: Golden Bolts
activeSkills.description:
500% damage to 2 enemies. If the user has a Power Charge, it will be consumed to deal 750% damage instead. This attack ignores damage reduction effects. Removes Burn and Poison status effects (including Lethal Poison) from the user and grants the user Recovery Mist for 100TU. Recovery Mist effects do not stack. Usable if the user has a Power Charge or a Burn or Poison status effect.

A unit with Recovery Mist will heal for 5% of their max HP and have a 30% chance to be Purified after every turn.

activeSkills.name: Crackling Smite
activeSkills.description: This attack ignores Guardians. 600% damage to 1 enemy if they are awake after having fallen asleep while on the battlefield. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

activeSkills.name: Hypno Blast+
activeSkills.description: 50% damage to 1 enemy. 300% damage instead every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield. 25% chance of granting that enemy the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. If Sleep is applied, it will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

activeSkills.name: Mass Sleep
activeSkills.description: Targets all units on the battlefield other than the user. Grants all Fire, Earth and Dark targets the Sleep status effect for 200TU and all Water, Storm and Light targets the Sleep status effect for 50TU. This Sleep will be applied even to targets that have already slept while on the battlefield. This skill becomes locked for 300TU after use.

activeSkills.name: Piercing Nightmare
activeSkills.description:
400% damage to all enemies, 600% instead to all sleeping enemies. Each non-sleeping enemy hit has a 50% chance of being granted the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This attack ignores damage reduction effects. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

Usable if there is a sleeping enemy on the battlefield. Allies lose 1 Spirit for each sleeping enemy hit by this attack. This skill becomes locked for 200TU after use if Allies would lose more Spirit than they have in this way. Other effects that would cause Allies to lose Spirit may apply before Spirit lost by this skill.

activeSkills.name: Hat Trick
activeSkills.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy, and exchanges the user's current HP with the amount of HP the user has currently lost. Allies gain Spirit equal to the number of units that are sleeping or have slept while on the battlefield after this attack.

activeSkills.name: Royal Bloodbath
activeSkills.description:
Immediately give all other allies that are burning the next turns by reducing their current TU. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn. Grants the user Healing Burn for 300TU. This will overwrite other status effects on the user. This skill becomes locked for 200TU after use. This skill cannot be used unless there is at least 1 other burning ally on the battlefield.

A unit with Healing Burn will heal after each turn at the same rate as Burn would deal damage instead of taking damage from Burn. Healing Burn will overwrite other status effects on the user and can replace the Burn status effect, but cannot be replaced by Burn. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. Healing Burn will not be removed by Purify skills.

activeSkills.name: Heated Strike
activeSkills.description:
100% damage to 1 enemy, 400% damage if the user is burning, 600% damage if there are at least 4 units with the burn status effect. The user is granted Healing Burn for 300TU and 1 Charge after damage is dealt.

Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Royal Crimsonsting
activeSkills.description: 300% damage to all enemies, plus 100% for each each charge stored by the user (600% max). This attack does not consume charges and ignores the Stealth status effect. The user is granted 1 Charge after damage is dealt. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect or if the user is alone on the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Burning Blood
activeSkills.description:
The user is granted the Mega Healing Burn status effect for 100TU, and is healed for 100% of max HP. Usable only if the user has stored 3 Charges. Consumes all Charges on the user.

A unit with Mega Healing Burn will heal after each turn at 20 times the rate as Healing Burn. Mega Healing Burn will overwrite other status effects including Healing Burn on the user, cannot be overwritten by Burn, Poison or Sleep status effects, and cannot be Purified. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Mega Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. A unit with Mega Healing Burn will be granted Healing Burn for 300TU when Mega Healing Burn expires.

activeSkills.name: Blastwave
activeSkills.description: 100% damage to all enemies. 250% damage instead and stuns each enemy for 100TU if they are dealt damage every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield. Heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

activeSkills.name: Royal Blightburst
activeSkills.description:
The user becomes Enraged, and is granted either a Stun Ward or Sleep Ward at random. Heals all allies for 400% of the user's Attack and Weakens all enemies. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. These effects will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on affected units. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

activeSkills.name: Royal Void
activeSkills.description: Targets 1 enemy. 500% damage to targets that have defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield, or to any target if the user has defeated 2+ units with attacks while on the battlefield. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, the effects of Skin passive skills and will ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

activeSkills.name: Elemental Eruption
activeSkills.description:
500% damage to 2 enemies, and heals the user for 100% of max HP if damage is dealt. This attack ignores damage reduction effects.

Enemies damaged by this attack will be granted one of the following effects:
- Sleep for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield if they are a Fire or Light unit.
- Mega Poison for 200TU if they are a Storm or Earth unit.
- Stun for 200TU if they are a Water or Dark unit.

Locked for 200TU after the user has entered the battlefield, and locks again after each use. After the first use, unlocks each time the user damages an enemy with a different attack. Sleep and Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. This is not considered a Combo Burst type active skill.

activeSkills.name: Weakening Drain
activeSkills.description:
100% damage to 2 enemies. 600% damage instead if the user has survived for 200TU on the battlefield. Heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt. All enemies hit by this attack will become Weakened, this will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on those units.

Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

activeSkills.name: Friendly Evasion
activeSkills.description: Grants the Stealth status effect with a Stealth Shield to 1 other ally. Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on that ally. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth. Stealth Shields prevent the next other status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying.

activeSkills.name: Dawn of Spring
activeSkills.description:
Immediately give all other allies that are at max HP the next turns by reducing their current TU. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn.

Then heals all allies other than the user for 100% of their max HP, Purifies them (removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison), and grants them Recovery Mist for 200TU. A unit with Recovery Mist will heal for 5% of their max HP and have a 30% chance to be Purified after every turn. Recovery Mist effects do not stack. Usable once per battle.

activeSkills.name: Flower Shower
activeSkills.description:
Randomly grants each non-burning ally either a Stun Ward, Sleep Ward, or Poison Ward and Purifies them.

If the user's current HP is at 50% or less, exchanges the user's current HP with the amount of HP the user has currently lost.

Weakens all enemies.

Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

activeSkills.name: Scorching Spirit
activeSkills.description:
Damage to 1 Enemy. The user is then granted the Healing Burn status effect for 300TU. Allies gain Spirit equal to the number of burning units on the battlefield after this attack.

A unit with Healing Burn will heal after each turn at the same rate as Burn would deal damage instead of taking damage from Burn. Healing Burn will overwrite other status effects on the user and can replace the Burn status effect, but cannot be replaced by Burn. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. Healing Burn will not be removed by Purify skills.

activeSkills.name: Burning Claw
activeSkills.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy and Burns all other Allies. Burn will overwrite other status effects on those allies. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect.

activeSkills.name: Underworld Burn
activeSkills.description:
The user gains the Mega Healing Burn status effect for 100TU. Also heals each other ally that is either Fire element or has a Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skill for 50% of their max HP.

This skill is unlocked either:
- Each time the user defeats another unit with an attack.
- When this unit enters battle, if 2 other allies are either Fire element or have a Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skill.

A unit with Mega Healing Burn will heal after each turn at 20 times the rate as Healing Burn. This will overwrite other status effects including Healing Burn on the user, cannot be overwritten by Burn, Poison or Sleep status effects, and cannot be Purified. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Mega Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. A unit with Mega Healing Burn will be granted Healing Burn for 300TU when Mega Healing Burn expires.

This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Hellhound
activeSkills.description:
300% damage to all enemies, 500% if the user is below 50% of max HP.

Each unit on the battlefield has a 50% chance of being stunned for 100TU. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect.

activeSkills.name: Shatter Blast
activeSkills.description:
50% damage to 1 enemy. 300% damage instead and the user gains a Power Charge every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield.

After damage is dealt the user becomes enraged, having their attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn, and has a 50% chance to immediately get the next turn. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills.

Power Charges cannot stack and will be removed when the user leaves the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Demolition Raid
activeSkills.description: Consumes a Power Charge for 600% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Usable only if the user has a Power Charge.

activeSkills.name: Spirit Crash
activeSkills.description: The Enemy team loses all Spirit. If the user's current HP is at 50% or less, exchanges the user's current HP with the amount of HP the user has currently lost. This skill becomes locked for 150TU after use.

activeSkills.name: Savage Storm
activeSkills.description:
600% damage to 1 enemy and heals the user for 100% of max HP if damage is dealt. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. The user will also gain a power charge and Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack.

Usable if the user has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield. This skill becomes locked after use until the user deals damage with another attack. This is not considered a Combo Burst type active skill.

activeSkills.name: Knockout Hit
activeSkills.description: 100% damage to 1 enemy. 400% damage instead if the user's Drowning Blossom active skill has reached its usage limit. If no enemies are sleeping, grants the target the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This will overwrite other status effects on that unit. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

activeSkills.name: Drowning Blossom
activeSkills.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy, this damage will not wake up the enemy. Usable if the user's party has 6 or more Spirit or if 2 or more enemies are sleeping. This attack ignores skin passive skills, and the Counter Stance status effect. Usable 3 times per battle.

activeSkills.name: Nightmare Dragon
activeSkills.description: 600% damage to 2 enemies if they are sleeping, this damage will not wake up sleeping enemies. Allies gain 3 Spirit for each sleeping target hit. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects.

activeSkills.name: With the Fishes
activeSkills.description: Grants 2 enemies the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Unlocked each time the user defeats another unit with an attack or if this unit is on the battlefield at the very start of the battle. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Combined Forces
activeSkills.description: 50% damage to 1 enemy. Damage doubles for each other "Dark Sun Wukong, The Great Menace, Hell's Equal" in the ally team, including reinforcements (800% max). Enrages each other ally "Dark Sun Wukong, The Great Menace, Hell's Equal" on the battlefield. This will overwrite the effects of previous Enrage skills. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

activeSkills.name: Prime Blow
activeSkills.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy. Usable only if the user's HP is at 75%+.

activeSkills.name: Lightning Kick
activeSkills.description:
800% damage to 1 enemy and then Mega Poisons them for 200TU. Heals the user fully. Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy.

Locked for 100TU after the user has entered the battlefield, and locks again for 100TU after each use.

Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

activeSkills.name: Doubling Arts
activeSkills.description:
Adds another Dark Sun Wukong to the next in line of allied reinforcements. This Dark Sun Wukong's Level, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon, and Accessory will match the user.

Then if 4 allies are on the battlefield, the user exchanges themselves with the Dark Sun Wukong added to allied reinforcements. Usable only if the user doesn't have the Counter Stance status effect. This skill is locked if there are 4+ conjured copies of "Dark Sun Wukong, The Great Menace, Hell's Equal" among allies on the battlefield and allied reinforcements.

activeSkills.name: Dual Toxins
activeSkills.description:
The first time this skill is activated while on the battlefield, the user will get the next turn by having their TU reduced to 0.

Targets 2 enemies. If they are not burning, poisoned, or sleeping, they are randomly granted either Noxious Sleep for 100TU or Mega Poison for 200TU.

Noxious Sleep can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage. A unit with Noxious Sleep will be granted Mega Poison for 200TU when Noxious Sleep expires.

Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. These status effects will overwrite other status effects if applied.

activeSkills.name: Cerulean Bride
activeSkills.description: 600% damage to 2 enemies if they are sleeping. The user recovers HP to 100% of its own max if damage is dealt to a sleeping target.

activeSkills.name: Endless Bride
activeSkills.description: 600% damage to 2 enemies if they are poisoned. The user recovers HP to 100% of its own max if damage is dealt to a poisoned target.

activeSkills.name: Final Vows
activeSkills.description:
250% damage to 1 enemy, 400% if there is any poisoned or sleeping enemy on the battlefield, or 600% damage if there are both (even if the target is not poisoned or sleeping). If the targeted enemy is not burning, poisoned, or sleeping, they are randomly granted either Noxious Sleep for 100TU or Mega Poison for 200TU.

These status effects will overwrite other status effects if applied. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, Skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. This is considered a Dream Hunter type Active Skill. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

activeSkills.name: Royal Flame
activeSkills.description:
400% damage to 1 enemy if the user is burning. Otherwise, damage to 1 enemy and the user is then granted the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on the user. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

If the user's current HP is at 50% or less, exchanges the user's current HP with the amount of HP the user has currently lost.

activeSkills.name: Burning Blaze
activeSkills.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores the Stealth and Counter Stance Status Effects, the effects of Skin passive skills, and Revenge passive skills. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect.

activeSkills.name: Royal Ignition
activeSkills.description: Burns all units on the battlefield, this will overwrite other status effects on those units. All allies are fully healed. Allies gain 1 Spirit for each other ally that is either Fire element or has a Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skill. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

activeSkills.name: Royal Judgment
activeSkills.description: 750% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable only if all units on the battlefield are burning. This is considered a Burn Drive type active skill.

activeSkills.name: Snake Bite
activeSkills.description: 50% damage to 1 enemy. 300% damage every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield. The damaged enemy also becomes Poisoned, with a 25% chance of becoming Mega Poisoned for 200TU instead. Poisons will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills.

activeSkills.name: Mirage Serpent
activeSkills.description: Targets 1 enemy. If they are poisoned, deals 600% damage, and Mega Poisons them for 200TU. This will overwrite existing Poison on that enemy.

activeSkills.name: Checkmate
activeSkills.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. Usable only if there is an Imposter among enemies on the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Dusk Mirage
activeSkills.description: Exchanges 1 enemy with an Imposter. The exchanged enemy will be sent to a random place in line of enemy reinforcements. If there are no enemy reinforcements, add enough Imposters to the enemy team to still send the targeted enemy to reinforcements (max 3). Usable only if there are at least 2 non-Imposter enemies on the battlefield and becomes locked for 200TU after use. This skill will have no effect if the targeted enemy is Immovable.

activeSkills.name: Dream Weaver
activeSkills.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy if there is a sleeping enemy (even if the target is not sleeping). If there are no sleeping enemies, 50% damage instead and allies gain an additional 2 Spirit. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and is considered a Dream Hunter type Active Skill.

activeSkills.name: Lights Out
activeSkills.description: Grants 2 enemies the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. For each targeted enemy that does not fall asleep (e.g. due to a Sleep Ward), allies gain 2 Spirit. Usable only if no enemies are sleeping.

activeSkills.name: Demolition Raid
activeSkills.description: Consumes a Power Charge for 600% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Usable only if the user has a Power Charge.

activeSkills.name: Aegis Overload
activeSkills.description:
300% damage to all enemies and heals all allies for 800% of the user's Attack. All allies will become Enraged and all enemies hit by this attack will become Weakened, this will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on those units. This attack ignores Skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

The user will also have their Power Barrier passive skill reactivated and gain a Power Charge. Usable only if the user's Power Barrier passive skill is deactivated and becomes locked for 100TU after use.

- Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.
- Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.
- Power Charges cannot stack and will be removed when the user leaves the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Dark Hypnosis
activeSkills.description:
Hypnotizes a random enemy (20%+ chance) and Mega Poisons them for 200TU (100% chance). A Hypnotized enemy will use its next turn to grant the turn to and Purify the hypnotizer (the turn will be lost as if it were sleeping), and then the hypnosis will end. The chance of Hypnosis applying increases by 20% for each awakening the user has, up to 100% max when fully awakened.

Hypnosis is not a status effect and cannot be removed by Purify skills, but will be canceled if the user is defeated or leaves the battlefield. Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use and cannot be used if an enemy is already Hypnotized. Hypnosis will fail against Boss units.

activeSkills.name: Devil's Dance
activeSkills.description:
300% damage to all enemies, and each enemy hit has a 50% chance to be Mega Poisoned for 200TU. This attack ignores skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

Usable only if there is an enemy Guardian on the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Reaping Scythe
activeSkills.description: Targets 2 enemies and deals 100% damage. 400% damage instead against poisoned targets and steals 1 Spirit from enemies for each poisoned enemy hit. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, skin passive skills, and the Counter Stance status effect.

activeSkills.name: Survivor's Edict
activeSkills.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy then Mega Poisons them for 200TU, this will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Heals the user for 100% of max HP if damage is dealt. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. The user will also Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1 HP. Endure effects cannot stack. Locked for 300TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Go for the Eyes!
activeSkills.description: 50% damage to 1 enemy and Weakens them (reduces their Attack to 0.75x until the end of their next turn). This attack cannot be redirected by enemy Guardians. This will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on the target and can be overwritten by Enrage effects. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects.

activeSkills.name: Stun Bolt
activeSkills.description: Stuns 1 enemy for 100TU. Usable once per battle and only if there is an ally "Odin, Goddess of All Laws" on the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Supreme Revival
activeSkills.description: Sacrifices the user to revive the Odin that conjured the user to the battlefield with full HP. Usable if there is not already an ally "Odin, Goddess of All Laws" on the battlefield or in allied reinforcements. The revived Odin will be considered a conjured unit and will have use limits on active skills reset.

activeSkills.name: Time Blaster
activeSkills.description: Targets 1 enemy and deals 100% damage minimum. If the target has 50+ TU, deals 300% damage and steals 1 Spirit from enemies. 500% damage and 2 Spirit stolen instead if the target has 100+ TU.

activeSkills.name: Supreme Stun
activeSkills.description: Stuns 1 enemy for 500TU. The user is fully healed and purified (any negative status effects such as Sleep, Burn, or Poison are removed from the user). Usable once per battle.

activeSkills.name: Gungnir
activeSkills.description: Sacrifices the ally Winged Shade on the battlefield with the highest current TU for 600% damage to 1 enemy, then adds 2 Winged Shades to random places in ally reinforcements. The user is healed fully and is purified. This does not prevent new status effects from applying to the user. Usable only if there is an ally Winged Shade on the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Ragnarok
activeSkills.description: Sacrifices the user to deal 600% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and the Stealth status effect. Adds 1 Winged Shade to a random place in ally reinforcements for each Awakening the user has, up to 4 max when fully awakened. Locked for 200TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Moonlight
activeSkills.description: 75% damage to 2 enemies. 500% damage instead to targets that are sleeping. Allies gain 1 additional Spirit for each sleeping target hit.

activeSkills.name: Gravity Cannon
activeSkills.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy if they do not have the Burn status effect. Usable if the user has the Stealth status effect. This attack ignores any enemy status effects, damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills.

activeSkills.name: Lunar Veil
activeSkills.description: The user gains the Stealth status effect with a Stealth shield. This will overwrite other Status effects on the user. The user will also Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack. Usable if the user does not have the Stealth or Burn status effects. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth. Stealth Shield prevents the next other status effect the user would gain while Stealthed from applying.

activeSkills.name: Survivor's Barrage
activeSkills.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy and heals the user for 100% of max HP if damage is dealt. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Locked for 300TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Thunder Blast
activeSkills.description: 50% damage to 1 enemy. 300% damage instead and the user gains a Power Charge every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield. 30% chance of stunning another random enemy for 100TU if the target is not defeated by this attack. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills. Power Charges cannot stack and will be removed when the user leaves the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Time Dominator
activeSkills.description: Targets 1 enemy. If the target has 100+ TU, deals 500% damage and the user gains a Power Charge. If the target does not have 100+ TU but the user has a Power Charge, it will be consumed to still deal 500% damage. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects.

activeSkills.name: Thunder Breaker
activeSkills.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy if they are a Guardian. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Stuns another random enemy for 200TU if the target was a Guardian and survives this attack with 35% or less of max HP. This skill will be locked after use until the end of the user's next turn.

activeSkills.name: Divine Reflection
activeSkills.description:
Heals all allies for 800% of the user's Attack and Purifies them. Allies other than the user also become Enraged, having their attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn, and their current TU is reduced by 50 if their current TU is 50 or more.

This skill becomes locked for 200TU after use. When any unit gets the turn after this lock expires, the lowest TU enemy will be stunned for 50TU, and then the user will be Purified (even if sleeping) and get the next turn instead by having their TU reduced to 0. This extra turn may be interrupted by other effects that influence the turn order (e.g. other stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

activeSkills.name: Dark Spirit
activeSkills.description: Damage to 1 enemy. If the user's current HP is at 50% or less, exchanges the user's current HP with the amount of HP the user has currently lost. Otherwise, allies gain 2 additional Spirit.

activeSkills.name: Stealth Zone
activeSkills.description:
Each ally with a Stealth Strike type active skill is healed for HP equal to 500% of the user's Attack, becomes Enraged, and gains Stealth with a Stealth Shield. Allies gain 3 Spirit for each other affected ally. Cannot be used if the user already has both Stealth and a Stealth Shield.

-Stealth Strike type active skills are any skills that are unlocked while their user has Stealth.
-Stealth Shields prevent the next other status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying.
-Stealth will overwrite other status effects on affected units. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.
-Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills on affected units.

activeSkills.name: Stealth Ravager
activeSkills.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies. Allies gain 1 Spirit for each ally that has the Stealth status effect. Usable only if the user has the Stealth status effect. This attack ignores any enemy status effects (including Stealth), damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills.

activeSkills.name: Survivor's Rush
activeSkills.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. The user will also Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP, is healed fully, and is granted the Stealth status effect with a Stealth Shield. Endure effects cannot stack. Locked for 300TU after the user has entered the battlefield, and locks again for 50TU after each use.

activeSkills.name: Rallying Queen
activeSkills.description:
Damage to 1 enemy. Allies on the battlefield with active skills that can Stun or Combo Burst type active skills are granted Sleep Wards and become Enraged (this will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills on those allies). Combo Burst type active skills also become unlocked for allies on the battlefield.

-Active Attack skills that unlock for one use when their user deals damage with an attack are considered Combo Burst type skills. They will still lock again after use or if their user leaves the battlefield.
-Sleep Ward prevents Sleep from being applied once, then is removed. Sleep Wards cannot stack.
-Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

activeSkills.name: Combo Drain+
activeSkills.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy. Heals the user for 100% of max HP if damage is dealt. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Deadly Command
activeSkills.description: Immediately give 2 other allies the next turns by reducing their current TU, and remove negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison from them and the user. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the given turns (e.g. Counter Stance and Stuns targeting the lowest TU target). Unlocked each time the user defeats another unit with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn. Cannot be used if the user is alone on the battlefield, and will not reduce the user's TU if they are targeted.

activeSkills.name: Fatal Frenzy
activeSkills.description: 250% damage to 1 enemy. 400% damage instead if the user has defeated 2+ units with attacks while on the battlefield. This attack ignores any passive skills or effects of active skills of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Heals the user for 100% of max HP if damage is dealt. Usable if the user has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Regal Pressure
activeSkills.description: Grants the Super Poison status effect to 2 enemies and adds 2 Kuromoris to the very end of the allied reinforcements if there was no Kuromori at the very end of allied reinforcements already. Otherwise adds 1 Kuromori. Super Poison will overwrite other status effects on those enemies. Super Poison deals 4 times the damage of normal poison, and cannot be overwritten by normal poison.

activeSkills.name: Regal Fangsbane
activeSkills.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies if they are poisoned. Heals the user for 100% of max HP if damage is dealt to a poisoned enemy.

activeSkills.name: Regal Cometflare
activeSkills.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy if they have defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield. If the target has not defeated any units and there are any allied reinforcements, instead the last unit in the allied reinforcements is sacrificed to still deal 500% damage. This attack ignores the Counter Stance status effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

activeSkills.name: Regal Eclipse
activeSkills.description: Immediately defeats 1 non-boss enemy that has not defeated any units with attacks while on the battlefield, the user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful. This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, and cannot be redirected by Guardians. Usable only if the user has stored 3 Charges, and only up to 3 times per battle. Consumes all Charges on the user.

activeSkills.name: Swift Rage
activeSkills.description: 75% damage to 1 enemy. The user becomes Enraged, having its Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of its next turn. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills.

activeSkills.name: Purify Stun
activeSkills.description:
Removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison from 2 allies. Stuns 1 random enemy for 50TU for each time a non-Burn status effect is removed by this skill.

If the user is in Battle Trance, the user will immediately get the next turn by having its TU reduced to 0, then this skill will become locked until the user leaves Battle Trance. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

activeSkills.name: Bonds of Agony
activeSkills.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy. The user becomes Enraged, having its Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of its next turn. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills. Usable only if this unit is in Battle Trance.

activeSkills.name: Bridal Swiftslash
activeSkills.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy, and the user recovers HP by 100% of its own max HP if damage is dealt. The user will also recover HP by 100% of its own max the next time it survives an attack. (The user must survive until after the end of the turn it is attacked for this to trigger.) This attack ignores damage reduction effects. Usable only if the user's HP is at 50% or less and the user is not in Battle Trance.

activeSkills.name: Swift Strike+
activeSkills.description: 75% damage to 1 enemy and allies gain 2 Spirit.

activeSkills.name: Call Morphie
activeSkills.description: Adds Morphie next in line of allied reinforcements, then exchanges 1 other ally with it if there are already 4 allies on the battlefield. Usable only if there is at least 1 other ally on the battlefield, and there is not already an ally Morphie on the battlefield or in allied reinforcements. This skill becomes locked once Alice is in Starlight Champion form.

activeSkills.name: Magical Starshower
activeSkills.description: 300% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores the Counter Stance and Stealth status effects, revenge passive skills, and the effects of Skin passive skills. Usable only if the user's party has 6 or more Spirit.

activeSkills.name: Magical Drain
activeSkills.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy, and the user recovers HP by 100% of its own max HP if damage is dealt. This attack ignores damage reduction effects. Usable only if the user's HP is at 50% or less.

activeSkills.name: Raging Charge
activeSkills.description:
75% damage to 1 enemy, the user is granted 1 Charge and becomes Enraged, having its Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of its next turn. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills.

Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Honnoji Bazooka
activeSkills.description: Targets all enemies and ignores the Stealth status effect. Deals either 100%, 200%, or 400% damage, chosen at random for each target. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills. Usable only if the user has stored at least one charge. Consumes 1 charge on the user.

activeSkills.name: Instant Bazooka
activeSkills.description:
400% damage to 1 enemy, heals the user fully and grants 1 Charge to the user. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect. 500% damage and gain 2 Charges instead if there are at least 4 units with the Burn status effect. 600% damage and 3 Charges if there are at least 6 units with burn.

This skill becomes locked for 50TU for each Charge stored by the user after use, up to 150TU for 3 Charges stored.

activeSkills.name: Honnoji Missile
activeSkills.description:
400% damage to 1 enemy. The user gains the Healing Burn status effect for 300TU and a Stun Ward. Usable only if the user does not have Healing Burn already and has stored at least one charge. Consumes 1 charge on the user.

-Stun Ward prevents Stun from being applied once, then is removed. Stun Wards cannot stack.
-A unit with Healing Burn will heal after each turn at the same rate as Burn would deal damage instead of taking damage from Burn. Healing Burn will overwrite other status effects on the user and can replace the Burn status effect, but cannot be replaced by Burn. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. Healing Burn will not be removed by Purify skills.

activeSkills.name: Spark Blast
activeSkills.description:
50% damage to 1 enemy. 300% damage instead every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills.

25% chance of reducing the user's active skill TU costs by 50% on its next turn. Effects that further reduce TU will have diminishing returns while this TU cost reduction is in effect.

Also grants the user the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on the user.

activeSkills.name: Crimson Ward
activeSkills.description: Burns 1 Ally and grants them either a Stun Ward if they are a Fire or Earth unit, a Sleep Ward if they are a Storm or Dark unit, or a Poison Ward if they are a Water or Light unit. Burn will overwrite other status effects on that ally. Wards will prevent their named effect from applying to that ally once, then be removed. Identical Wards cannot stack. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

activeSkills.name: Demon Hellfire
activeSkills.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy, this attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of skin passive skills. The user and the target are immediately granted the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on both units. Usable if the user's party has 6 or more Spirit.

activeSkills.name: Stroke of Death
activeSkills.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy and heals the user for 100% of max HP if damage is dealt. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills. Unlocked each time this unit gains the Burn status effect. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

activeSkills.name: Double Spirit
activeSkills.description: Doubles current Ally Spirit. If Ally Spirit is 0, gain 1 Spirit instead.

activeSkills.name: Little Bright Garden
activeSkills.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Usable if the user's party has 6 or more Spirit or if all allies on the battlefield are at max HP.

activeSkills.name: Instant Restoration
activeSkills.description: Removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison from 1 ally, and heals them for HP equal to 500% of the user's Attack. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

activeSkills.name: Dark Transformation
activeSkills.description:
The user transforms into Snow Black. Snow Black's Level, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon and Accessory will match the user. Snow Black will start with full HP, will be treated as a new conjured unit, and is considered to have entered the battlefield upon transformation.

Locked for 300TU after the user has entered the battlefield, or until a non-conjured enemy on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source. Snow White cannot activate any other active skills while this skill is unlocked. When a unit transforms, it is not considered to have been defeated or sacrificed.

activeSkills.name: Poison Shock
activeSkills.description: Grants the Poison status effect to 1 enemy and Stuns them for 50TU. Poison will overwrite other status effects on that unit. This skill can be redirected by enemy Stun Absorbers.

activeSkills.name: Chrono Chaos
activeSkills.description:
Stuns all enemies for 150TU. Then if there is no enemy Stun Absorber, all other allies are Purified, granted Sleep Wards, Quickened by 30%, Stunned for 100TU, and then this skill becomes locked while this unit remains on the battlefield.

For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies while this unit is a Guardian, 1 of the hits is instead redirected to this unit. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage. Usable only if this unit is not already a Guardian.
